items.title: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
items.dek: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.
items.body: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: How one of India's most successful female politicians is losing her party
items.dek: Mamata Banerjee's once-dominant Trinamool Congress party is unravelling, weeks after losing power in West Bengal.
items.body: Mamata Banerjee's once-dominant Trinamool Congress party is unravelling, weeks after losing power in West Bengal.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Watch: Trump tells BBC Netanyahu did not defy him
items.dek: In a call with the US president, the BBC’s Sarah Smith asked Trump about the war in Iran and his relationship with the Israeli leader.
items.body: In a call with the US president, the BBC’s Sarah Smith asked Trump about the war in Iran and his relationship with the Israeli leader.
items.author: IriLine Desk
